response:
A supervisor in a primary care clinic setting needs to compose a letter of appreciation for a medical technician. The letter was provided by an external stakeholder and includes the following information:  
Between August 2023 and October 2023, MCpl King volunteered in the committee organizing the Tri-Mess Battle of the Bands event. Their hard work, experience, and enthusiasm were essential in the committee’s efforts to plan and run the event – which contributed to the morale and welfare of the members of CFB Kingston as well as promoted a positive relationship in the community by accepting donations to the Partners in Mission Food Bank. Their expertise and services as PMC for the Junior Ranks Mess were an essential component of the event's success.
